title: epidendrum beharorum
intro: Epidendrum beharorum is a species of orchid native to the Andes mountains in South America, characterized by its vibrant green leaves and white, waxy flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and inflammation, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Epidendrum beharorum include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some regions, it is also used to make a decoction or tincture for its medicinal purposes.
